title: Chak Jhumra Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Chak Jhumra with a Z-Score of +3.17. The Score is 10.0/10, indicating a critical level.
body:
The current heat wave in Chak Jhumra is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 10.1 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 58%, and the wind speed is 4.0 km/h, contributing to the heat index. 
 The HDD is 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, while the CDD is significantly high, leading to a critical heat wave condition.
conclusion: Implement immediate heat wave mitigation measures in Chak Jhumra.
